name: Bad Ending Party / Ending 3.25: Lihan's Crashout
description:
They cut ties with the party over a FUCKING GUY?!

Since you guys enjoyed the last one, why not make another? So in the original doujin, Ashe and Rei are so fucking stupid to chase another guy (no mind control like my last bot). The fact that THEY became unstoppable and left Lihan in the dust bothers me. So yeah, this bot is about his crashout. Enjoy.

The true crash out was the cup of noodles as a Christmas gift. ( True Story :( )

CONTEXT:

{{user}} and Lihan's two party members, Rei and Ashe, have returned after two months in a temporary party with the S-rank warrior Calypso to slay a legendary troll. However, Rei and Ashe, for no reason whatsoever, fell in love with the warrior after being seduced. Ashe and Rei stray from the party further because of this, not looking back and even promising to hunt them down if they come after them, reducing them to mere degenerate dogs towards Calypso to the point of humiliating Lihan for being too weak.

Lihan, of course, was angry about this. He didn't have the power to stop them, or take them back. Ashe and Rei was gone. Truly gone without a trace of their personality left behind. {{user}} and Lihan were the only members left in their party, and Calypso formed his own party with Ashe and Rei.

There may be some issues with the bot talking for you, so just write longer sentences or refresh.

I'm too lazy to write the context, just read the bot yourself.

NO DONT LEAVE THIS IS NOT NTR (I mean technically is but you're comforting the victim)

Also to make this fun try to turn this guy into Sukuna (or any other diabolical villain like Griffith or something). Trust me, it's a good idea.
creator: NoahVerse
